center.name: Zulia River
center.summary: Zulia River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-backed antshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A second population is found in the Zulia River valley in Colombia's Norte de Santander Department and the adjacent Cordillera de Mérida in western Venezuela

links.label: 分布于
